comingSoon.subtitle: Zoora is a live video classroom built for teaching that actually feels alive — low-latency rooms, recordings, and tools made for educators. We are putting on the finishing touches.
comingSoon.consent: No spam. One email when we open the doors.
comingSoon.success: You're on the list. We'll be in touch.
comingSoon.footerNote: Crafted for teachers and their students.

notFound.title: Page not found

form.createDescription: Add a question to a bank.
form.optionsHint: For multiple-choice, give correct options a positive score. For short answer, list accepted values with their scores.

hints.choice: Add at least 2 options. Correct options get a positive score; distractors can be 0 or negative.
hints.short_answer: List accepted answers with a non-negative score each.
hints.descriptive: Set the maximum score graders can award for this open-ended question.

errors.choice: Choice questions need at least 2 options.
errors.shortAnswer: Short-answer questions need at least 1 option.
errors.descriptive: Descriptive questions need a maximum score.
errors.negative: Negative scores are only allowed for multiple-choice options.
